name: Hive Golf Olympus Hills
about: Hive Golf provides an elevated indoor golf experience utilizing TrackMan technology with private simulator bays. The venue offers memberships, leagues, coaching, and private event capabilities with 24/7 access for members. While customers can bring their own food and beverage, alcohol is not permitted due to Utah liquor laws. The facility emphasizes a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all levels to practice, compete, and socialize.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan 4 technology for precise shot tracking
24/7 access for members with the Pro Data Key app
Free 30-minute introductory session for new customers
Variety of league formats including team and solo competitions
Private event bays accommodating up to 4 people each

food_and_drink.notes: Customers can bring outside food; no food available for purchase
Alcohol not permitted due to Utah liquor laws

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar technology favored by professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content doesn't explicitly mention club rentals, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, customers can bring outside food and non-alcoholic beverages. Alcohol is not permitted due to Utah liquor laws.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content doesn't specify the time required for 18 holes, as it varies depending on simulator usage and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears kid-friendly with coaching available for all ages and skill levels.
